_comment: Tide & Tally serve-contention tuning. The deepen pass added a serve-time register cooldown to make 'who do I serve next?' a real triage, but the playtest bot found it INERT at the shipped tuning (serve_time 1.5): the shop sells out daily and the register is never the bottleneck (blocked_ticks 0), so value-first and urgent-first reach identical gold/rep (Δ=0). This search hunts tuning where demand SATURATES (you can't serve everyone) AND the allocation genuinely matters (value-first vs urgent-first diverge) while the game stays winnable + progressable. Knobs: serve_time (register throughput), spawn_interval (arrival density), queue_visible (how many pile up at once), base_patience (fuse length).
